root.name: Government Schemes India
root.description: Eligibility tree for common Indian public welfare schemes

children.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST
children.description: Central government scholarship for SC/ST students pursuing post-matric education including professional and technical courses. Covers tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and book grants.

next_steps: Get caste certificate from tehsildar
Obtain family income certificate
Apply on National Scholarship Portal (scholarships.gov.in)
Submit institution verification letter

children.name: PM Vidyalaxmi (Education Loan Guarantee)
children.description: Government-backed education loan scheme for students admitted to quality higher education institutions. Provides collateral-free loans up to 10 lakh with interest subvention for economically weaker families.

next_steps: Secure admission in a recognized institution
Apply through PM Vidyalaxmi portal
Submit income proof and admission letter
Bank will process collateral-free loan

children.name: Income Support & Welfare
children.description: Direct benefit transfer and subsidy schemes for low-income families

children.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
children.description: Direct income support of Rs 6,000 per year in three installments to small and marginal farmer families. Covers all landholding farmers across India.

next_steps: Verify land records are updated
Register on PM-KISAN portal (pmkisan.gov.in)
Link Aadhaar with bank account
Submit application through village patwari or CSC center

children.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
children.description: Free LPG gas connections for women from Below Poverty Line families. Provides a deposit-free LPG connection with a financial assistance of Rs 1,600.

next_steps: Get BPL ration card or SECC list proof
Visit nearest LPG distributor
Submit Aadhaar and bank passbook copy
Connection will be issued in woman's name

children.name: Employment & Skill Development
children.description: Job creation, skill training, and entrepreneurship support

children.name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
children.description: Micro-loans up to Rs 10 lakh for small business and entrepreneurship. Three categories: Shishu (up to 50K), Kishore (50K-5L), Tarun (5L-10L). No collateral required.

next_steps: Prepare a simple business plan
Visit any bank, NBFC, or MFI
Submit ID proof, address proof, and business details
No collateral needed for loans up to 10 lakh

children.name: PMEGP (PM Employment Generation Programme)
children.description: Credit-linked subsidy for setting up new micro-enterprises. Subsidy ranges from 15-35% of project cost. Maximum project cost: Rs 50 lakh for manufacturing, Rs 20 lakh for services.

next_steps: Prepare detailed project report
Apply online through KVIC portal (kviconline.gov.in)
Undergo EDP training program
Bank will disburse loan with government subsidy margin

children.name: PMKVY (Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana)
children.description: Free skill training and certification for Indian youth. Provides industry-relevant training in 300+ job roles with Rs 8,000 reward on certification.

next_steps: Find nearest PMKVY training center on skillindia.gov.in
Enroll with Aadhaar and basic documents
Complete training course (150-300 hours)
Pass assessment to get government certificate and reward

children.name: Housing
children.description: Affordable housing schemes for rural and urban areas

children.name: PMAY-Gramin (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Rural)
children.description: Financial assistance for construction of pucca houses for rural homeless and those living in kutcha/dilapidated houses. Provides Rs 1.20 lakh in plains and Rs 1.30 lakh in hilly areas.

next_steps: Check eligibility on PMAY-G website (pmayg.nic.in)
Ensure name appears in SECC 2011 data
Apply through gram panchayat or block office
Construction must be completed within 12 months

children.name: PMAY-Urban (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban)
children.description: Interest subsidy on home loans for urban poor and middle-income groups. Credit-Linked Subsidy of 3-6.5% on home loans for EWS, LIG, and MIG categories.

next_steps: Check eligibility on pmaymis.gov.in
Apply through any scheduled bank or housing finance company
Submit income certificate and Aadhaar
Interest subsidy credited directly to loan account
